modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be distracting grammar usage and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Request to change assigned room during the semester.

full_description_text: The user wants to know how to change their room after the semester has started. They are unsure if it's possible to switch rooms or roommates at this time. They are looking for guidance on who to contact for this request.
short_description: Request to change assigned room during the semester.
description: The user wants to know how to change their room after the semester has started. They are unsure if it's possible to switch rooms or roommates at this time. They are looking for guidance on who to contact for this request.
